title: Nova Wireless Headphones
description: A starter product page example with a clean layout, clear pricing, and an easy call to action. Replace this with your own mock catalog as the project grows.

title: Elevate Laptop Stand
tagline: Simple ergonomic support for your desk.
description: Use this product data file for mock API-driven UI during frontend development. Later you can swap the JSON file for a backend endpoint with minimal changes.

title: Drip Pro Coffee Maker
tagline: A reliable daily brew with a modern finish.
description: This project structure keeps product data, product rendering, and page logic separate so features stay easy to maintain as your catalog becomes larger.

title: Halo Desk Lamp
tagline: Warm task lighting for late-night study sessions.
description: A simple component and page split helps you add filters, reviews, wishlists, and backend APIs later without rewriting the whole project.
